languages.text: Изимонд Зауэрбэк предан Ювенне — его поддержку следует сохранить.

traits.locale_text: Изимонд Зауэрбэк предан Ювенне — его поддержку следует сохранить.

languages.text: Isimond Sauerback is loyal to Juvenna — his support should be maintained.
languages.original_text: Изимонд Зауэрбэк предан Ювенне — его поддержку следует сохранить.

languages.text: 伊西蒙德·苏尔贝克忠于尤文娜——必须保住他的支持。
languages.original_text: Isimond Sauerback is loyal to Juvenna — his support should be maintained.

traits.locale_text: 伊西蒙德·苏尔贝克忠于尤文娜——必须保住他的支持。

languages.text: Isimond Sauerback es leal a Juvenna; su apoyo debe mantenerse.
languages.original_text: Isimond Sauerback is loyal to Juvenna — his support should be maintained.

traits.locale_text: Isimond Sauerback es leal a Juvenna; su apoyo debe mantenerse.

languages.text: Isimond Sauerback est un fidèle de Juvenna ; son soutien devrait être acquis.
languages.original_text: Isimond Sauerback is loyal to Juvenna — his support should be maintained.

traits.locale_text: Isimond Sauerback est un fidèle de Juvenna ; son soutien devrait être acquis.

languages.text: Isimond Sauerback ist Juvenna treu ergeben — seine Unterstützung sollte gewahrt bleiben.
languages.original_text: Isimond Sauerback is loyal to Juvenna — his support should be maintained.

traits.locale_text: Isimond Sauerback ist Juvenna treu ergeben — seine Unterstützung sollte gewahrt bleiben.

languages.text: İsimond Sauerback, Juvenna'ya sadık. Desteği sürdürülmeli.
languages.original_text: Isimond Sauerback is loyal to Juvenna — his support should be maintained.

traits.locale_text: İsimond Sauerback, Juvenna'ya sadık. Desteği sürdürülmeli.

languages.text: イシモンド・ザウアーバックはジュヴェナに忠実である。彼の支援は維持すべきだ。
languages.original_text: Isimond Sauerback is loyal to Juvenna — his support should be maintained.
